2233220.name: Spirits of The Silicium Forest
2233220.description:
Hi. My friend and I made this game. I hope you like it=)
Spirits of the Silicium Forest has several modes: Story and Rogue-lite.
Therefore, the game suits both the players who came for the aesthetics, atmosphere and story; and those who want to dive very deeply into the gameplay part of the game, experiment with a ton of different skills, unique builds and ways of beating the game.


A young girl named Tzap’lia has been given a great honor. Her life will become a gift to the merciful gods who guard the village from the evil spirits of the Silicium Forest.
But just as Tzap'lia thought she was getting used to her new role, her mother, a formerly captive priestess of the neighboring village, said that today was the day when Tzap’lia had to run away.


Aside from the story and aesthetics, the main enjoyment of the game is built on the ability to solve various tactical problems in many different ways.
The game encourages an intellectual and creative approach.
At the same time, gameplay-wise it's not a clone of well-known representatives of the genre with minor changes.
The turn order, the ability to change position, the build system rather than the deck system, as well as runes, items, summons and other mechanics allowed me to create new and interesting game situations. While conceptually preserving the spirit of the genre.


Builds and skills - more than 200 abilities from which you can form many different playstyles with their own objectives and unique gameplay.
Position system - it's important not only to form your build and use the acquired abilities, but also to tactically move around the battlefield.
Rune system - the correct use of runes allows you to outplay your enemies and get out of even the most dire situations.
Story mode and rogue-lite mode - learn the story of Tzap’lia and other heroes as they journey through the Silicium Forest or participate in a randomized run, with a simple and flexible system to customize your adventure.

Join my Discord channel , where you can chat with me directly.
2233220.supported_languages: 英语, 俄语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
